channel.title: Yorkshire Events - Live Events in Yorkshire, UK
channel.description: Comprehensive RSS feed of live events happening across Yorkshire, UK. Aggregated from multiple sources.

image.title: Yorkshire Events - Live Events in Yorkshire, UK

item.title: 24/07/2026 - Weird and Wonderful Whitby walking tour
item.description: Whitby daytime walking tour with the inimitable Madame Peculiar, exploring the alternative underside of this fascinating and important little town. A time-travelling adventure where history and folklore come together, with Madame Peculiar at the helm. Expect a gentle, accessible tour, jam-packed and quirky, with a sprinkling of mischief and mayhem. This fun and fascinating hour-long Whitby walking tour consistently attracts 5 star reviews. All ages and abilities, dogs welcome too.
item.dc:creator: Whitby Events

item.title: 25/07/2026 - Weird and Wonderful Whitby walking tour
item.description: Whitby daytime walking tour with the inimitable Madame Peculiar, exploring the alternative underside of this fascinating and important little town. Book online for this time-travelling adventure where history and folklore come together. Expect a gentle, accessible tour, jam-packed and quirky, with a sprinkling of mischief and mayhem. This fun and fascinating hour-long Whitby walking tour consistently attracts 5 star reviews. All ages and abilities, dogs welcome too.
